testsNote: author-verified -race clean; not re-run per audit instructions

findings.title: ExecuteTransaction is a no-op; money/custody 'atomic' compositions are not atomic
findings.evidence: libs/atlas-database/transaction.go:9-18 (isTransaction true for db.WithContext -> runs fn without db.Transaction); empirically verified a write survives an fn error. Relied on at listing/processor.go:440,512,977,1154 and kafka/consumer/custody/consumer.go:103,242,354,577,614
findings.scenario: Cancel of an auction with a live bid: UpdateState(active->cancelled) autocommits, holding.CreateHolding fails -> listing cancelled, no seller holding, no escrow release -> item lost + bidder NX stranded. Same class in handleMtsMoveListingToHolding (sold flip then holding/txn insert fail).
findings.note: bug_execute_transaction_noop / task-119 fix; platform-wide (~18 services), not introduced by this branch, but this is the money service and comments assert atomicity that does not hold.

findings.title: No Make(Entity)/Model.ToEntity() in entity.go
findings.evidence: listing/entity.go, bid/entity.go, holding/entity.go, wish/entity.go, transaction/entity.go — mapping via modelFromEntity (provider.go) + inline builder (administrator.go); deviates from file-responsibilities.md but functionally equivalent and codebase-consistent

findings.title: No TransformSlice() in rest.go
findings.evidence: listing/resource.go:244 uses model.SliceMap(Transform); intent satisfied, literal helper absent

findings.title: create-listing maps all errors (incl. DB) to 400
findings.evidence: listing/resource.go:141-145; internal getActiveCountBySeller DB error (listing/processor.go:643) surfaces as 400 not 500

passHighlights: Server-authoritative pricing: price read from listing row not client (listing/processor.go:798-813,941-962,1132)
Debit-first settle + commission-as-sink (saga/processor.go expandMtsSettlePurchase; MarkedUp listing/processor.go:866)
Escrow self-guard by bid state (listing/processor.go:435-484); sibling-offer release idempotent (389-422)
Full saga completion + reverse-walk + late-compensation inverses (saga/compensator.go:1229-1294,1357-1585); move-lost-race compensates buyer (custody/consumer.go:402-412)
DOM-25 config-resolved wire values via failNoticeOr (channel mts consumer.go:516-560)
Multi-tenancy: tenant.MustFromContext, no manual tenant_id Where; holding tenant from listing row (listing/processor.go:529,592)
